summary: The map topology recovery chain is now complete in main through M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001. Formal M7 content lock is not approved automatically. Product-owner reconsideration is now reopened with the decision options APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES.

current_evidence.caveat: Validation branch added process/handoff evidence only and did not add new test code; QA accepted coverage from already integrated tests and spot checks.

decision_options.meaning: Approve formal M7 content lock with recorded limits; after integration the project may proceed toward M7 exit validation while preserving all exclusions.
Do not approve content lock yet, but do not request a specific repair task; keep M7 blocked pending further product review.
Reject reconsideration again and provide the next specific blocker for a new bounded repair chain.

non_approvals: no telemetry, server, multiplayer, accounts, cloud-save implementation, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial/branding approval
no final art approval; route visuals remain low fidelity
no M7 exit validation start until this Human Gate resolves

tests_run.result: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 is CLOSED; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED.
No ready task emitted while Human Gate is active.

decisions.decision: Product-owner reconsideration is reopened after topology validation closed in main.
content_lock_accepted remains false until the product owner explicitly approves.
Do not start M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 until the formal content-lock Human Gate resolves.

risks.summary: Formal M7 content lock remains a Human Gate.
Topology evidence is sufficient for validation but not final art approval.

requested_action: Choose APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES for formal M7 content lock.
